'''âm-t-f-b''' ('''kamatfeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pheeze|pheeze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pheeze|pheeze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-t-f-b
|-
! Lemma
| kamatfeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimatfeboko|thimatfeboko]] || [[word:jimatfeboko|jimatfeboko]] || [[word:shimatfeboko|shimatfeboko]] || [[word:kimatfeboko|kimatfeboko]]
|-
